description: A plant used for flavoring, medicine, or fragrance; the useful green that heals and seasons. 'Heru' names what grows for use—nature's gift for health and taste.
sound_symbolism: The word breathes green. 'He' exhales with living breath, plant essence. Then 'ru' roots with growing presence, herb thriving.
grammatical_notes: Functions as noun: 'lo heru' (the herb). Source of 'nepha' (medicine), 'moli' (balm), 'wenu' (tonic). The plant before preparation.

pillars.solarpunk-values: Natural medicine—local herbs for local ailments, sustainable healing from what grows nearby.
pillars.pre-industrial-wisdom: Herbs sustained communities—kitchen gardens, healing gardens, knowledge of useful plants passed through generations.
